Name: 4FACTORS Modern Standard Arabic (MSA) Sample
Description: Native-written, human-verified Modern Standard Arabic: 50 formal sentences (news/official-statement register) with English glosses and domain labels. No scraping, machine translation, or synthetic generation.
Abstract: A public demonstration sample of 50 native-written Modern Standard Arabic sentences in news/official-statement register, each with an English gloss and a domain label. Written from scratch by a first-language speaker and reviewed line-by-line; both pre- and post-review file versions are retained for auditable provenance. No scraping, no machine translation, no synthetic generation. Larger sets and other Arabic varieties are available on commission with full IP transfer.
